Impact Director

Create Account

Welcome! A candidate account is required to apply and manage your applications. Enter the required details below then check your email to verify your account before applying. Already have an account? Sign in with your existing credentials.

Password Requirements:

  • A numeric character
  • A minimum of 8 characters
  • An alphabetic character
  • A lowercase character
  • An uppercase character
  • A special character

By clicking ‘create account’ you agree to allow City Year to store and process your data for the purpose of considering your eligibility for employment. For details regarding our privacy policy visit https://www.cityyear.org/privacy-policy/

Already have an account?
